prestazioni: Engine: VQ35DE (3.5L V6, 24-valve, DOHC) with a custom forced-induction setup using a Garrett GTX3076R Gen II turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) paired with a Tomei 3-inch stainless steel turbo manifold, supporting 12 psi of boost with a custom 3-inch downpipe and GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller for precise tuning.

Fuel System: Upgraded to a Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump, Injector Dynamics ID1000 fuel injectors (1000cc/min), and a Radium Engineering fuel pressure regulator (FPR) with a -6AN feed and return setup, complemented by a custom ECU reflash via UpRev Nismo Tuning software for optimized AFR and ignition timing under forced induction.

Drivetrain & Suspension: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (2-way) for the front differential, paired with a custom driveshaft from Driveshaft Shop (3.5-inch aluminum) to handle increased torque. Suspension overhaul includes KW Clubsport coilovers (2-way adjustable damping) with custom spring rates (8kg/mm front, 7kg/mm rear) and polyurethane bushings from Energy Suspension (full set) for improved chassis rigidity and response.
estetica: Aero: Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (Altima L33-specific) with custom carbon fiber front splitter and rear diffuser, paired with a Seibon carbon fiber hood (VQ35DE-specific cutouts) and a custom 3M matte vinyl wrap in Nissan Racing Red (code: KH3) with gloss black accents on the roof and mirrors.

Wheels & Brakes: Work Emotion CR Kiwami 2-piece forged wheels (19x9.5 +22 front, 19x10.5 +30 rear) in a custom bronze finish, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (255/35/19 front, 285/30/19 rear). Braking system upgraded to StopTech Trophy BBK (380mm front, 355mm rear) with DBA 5000 Series rotors and Ferodo DS2500 brake pads for track use.

Interior: Full Recaro SPG XL bucket seats (Nissan Altima-specific mounting brackets) with Schroth 6-point harnesses, paired with a custom half-cage from Cusco (bolt-in, 8-point) and a Nismo V2 350mm steering wheel with a NRG quick-release hub. Gauges include a Defi Advance BF series (oil pressure, boost, wideband AFR) mounted in a custom A-pillar pod.
